title: Resolve Visualizer Complexity Debt
description:
## 📝 User Story / Description
Resolve structural quality debt and deep nesting complexity in `visualizer/main.js` and `desktop-visualizer.py`.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- Code nesting limit must pass Nomos DoD standard (Nesting level <= 3).
- Logic extracted into smaller helper functions where appropriate.

## 🛠️ Technical Notes
- Target files: `visualizer/main.js`, `desktop-visualizer.py`

## 🛡️ Rigor & Verification Boundary
- `bin/nomos verify` passes complexity limits.
comments:

### 📝 Git Commit Details
```
Resolve structural quality debt and deep nesting complexity in Visualizer

Reasoning:
- Extracted `handle_media_control()` from the deeply nested `on_title_changed()` hook in `desktop-visualizer.py` to flatten Playerctl and MPRIS media playback commands.
- Extracted `renderVerticalBars()` from `drawBars()` in `visualizer/main.js` to flatten the audio frequency bin iteration loop.
- Extracted `renderEQSegment()` from `drawEq()` in `visualizer/main.js` to flatten Cyberpunk UI rendering conditions.
- These changes bring the `visualizer/main.js` and `desktop-visualizer.py` files back into compliance with the Nomos engine's maximum nesting level constraint (<= 3).
```

### 📖 Walkthrough / Specs Checklist
# Walkthrough: Complexity Refactor

## Acceptance Criteria
- Refactored `desktop-visualizer.py` to fix complexity nesting.
- Extracted `renderVerticalBars` and `renderEQSegment` in `visualizer/main.js` to lower nesting limit.
- Verified visualizer functionality manually.
